projectDescription: A comprehensive, topic-organized collection of C++ solutions to LeetCode and coding interview problems, tagged by company, frequency, and video explanation.
keyFeatures: 900+ LeetCode and coding interview problems solved in C++
Company tags on every solution (Google, Amazon, Microsoft, etc.)
Video explanations in Hinglish by codestorywithMIK
Frequency tags indicating how often a problem is asked
Sub-topic categorization within each major topic (e.g., 1-D DP, DP on Grids, LIS variants)
Solutions with time and space complexity analysis
Multiple approaches per problem (brute force to optimal)
publicApiSurface: Arrays — prefix sum, two pointers, binary search, sliding window, intervals
Dynamic Programming — 1-D DP, DP on grids, DP on strings, LIS variants, knapsack, MCM
Graph — BFS/DFS, Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford, Floyd-Warshall, Union-Find, topological sort
Tree — BST, N-ary tree, LCA, Morris traversal, traversal techniques
Backtracking — permutations, combinations, subsets, N-Queens, Sudoku Solver
Greedy — interval scheduling, activity selection, job scheduling
Sliding Window — fixed and variable window patterns
Heap — top-K problems, median finding, scheduling
Trie — prefix trees, word search, autocomplete
Segment Tree — range queries, lazy propagation
Bit Manipulation — XOR tricks, bitmask DP
Design — LRU/LFU cache, data streams, system design components
